title: Iran Post-Revolution Five-Year Development Plans (Sazman-e Barnameh va Budjeh / Plan & Budget Organization successor texts), 1st-7th Plans
source_org: Iran Data Portal (Syracuse University Maxwell School)
units: narrative legal/policy text, Persian language, not tabular
license_terms: Iranian government legal text (public law); hosted for research use by Iran Data Portal, cite Iran Data Portal + original law
notes: All 7 PDFs are the original Persian-language plan laws as passed by the Majles, hosted by Iran Data Portal (Syracuse Univ.) under 'Annual Budgets and Development Plans'. Filenames are as served by the source (Persian numerals/words for plan number, or barname_haftom = 'seventh plan' in Finglish for the 7th plan). Titles/date ranges in files[] mapping above are the agent's translation for cataloging; Persian year (SH) ranges per plan: 1st=1368-1372, 2nd=1374-1378, 3rd=1379-1383, 4th=1384-1388, 5th=1390-1394, 6th=1396-1400, 7th=1402-1406. These are Islamic Republic-era plans (Plan & Budget Organization was renamed/restructured multiple times post-1979, latterly Management and Planning Organization); Iran Data Portal did not have directly-linked Pahlavi-era (pre-1979) plan documents on this page — those would need to be sourced separately (e.g. Encyclopaedia Iranica, World Bank/Plan Organization archival reports, per SOURCES.md Round 20).
extraction_method: Extracted 2026-07-13 into data/processed/iran_plan_budget_org_series/five_year_plan_targets.csv (68 rows, 7 plans FY1368-1406). Method: Plans 6-7 (Word-native PDFs, ۶.pdf and barname_haftom.pdf) via pdftotext -layout + NFKC-normalized keyword search, cross-verified against pdftoppm-rendered page images (exact match) -- yielded full macro-target tables (GDP growth, TFP, investment, consumption, trade, money, inflation, unemployment) plus 9-sector value-added and employment growth targets for Plan 6, and the equivalent headline targets for Plan 7 (a BILL, not yet enacted). Plans 1-5 (scanned image PDFs, near-zero extractable text) via pdftoppm -r 250-400 render + direct visual reading. Plans 1 and 2 yielded their ماده واحده / dedicated quantitative-goals content (investment ceilings, GDP growth rate 5.1%/yr for Plan 2). Plans 3-5 are organized as extensive policy-reform chapters rather than a compact targets clause; a headline GDP growth figure was NOT located within this pass's time budget for these three plans -- recorded as an explicit gap, not guessed or filled from outside knowledge. Full working log: logs/downloads/iran-plan-budget-org-extraction.log. Full provenance/caveats: data/processed/iran_plan_budget_org_series/README.md.
